title: Moonlit Huntress of the Frozen Realm
fullPrompt:
She walked the frozen path between shadow and moonlight like the mountains themselves had chosen her to survive what others could not. Beside her, the sacred stag carried the silence of ancient realms, its glowing antlers cutting through the storm like a promise winter would never surrender quietly.Ultra-photorealistic dark fantasy winter warrior portrait, vertical 9:16, cinematic fantasy masterpiece, luxury fantasy book-cover aesthetic, hyper-detailed realism, moody atmospheric lighting, not anime, not CGI, not illustration.
A fierce dark-auburn haired huntress walks through a frozen mountain pass beneath an enormous glowing full moon. She has long windswept dark auburn hair, pale luminous skin, sharp dark amber eyes, and a calm but deadly expression. She wears layered black leather armor beneath a flowing midnight cloak trimmed with thick silver-gray fur, intricate engraved metal details, weathered belts, armored gauntlets, and tall battle-worn boots. Her cape whips dramatically in the icy wind as snow scatters around her.
She carries an elegant translucent ice-forged bow glowing faintly with blue-white magical energy, with crystalline frost textures along the limbs of the weapon. Behind her stands a majestic glowing white stag with massive luminous antlers and ethereal pale-blue eyes, appearing ancient, sacred, and spirit-like. The stag radiates soft moonlight against the dark snowy landscape.
Background: towering icy mountains, storm-dark clouds, drifting snow, frozen cliffs, pine forests fading into mist, and moonlight reflecting across the snow-covered terrain. Atmosphere feels ancient, mythic, cold, and powerful, like a guardian of the winter realms.
Lighting: dramatic silver-blue moonlight, cinematic contrast, soft volumetric fog, glowing highlights on snow and fur, realistic shadows, ultra-detailed textures, crisp focus, smooth clean rendering, no pixelation, no oversharpening, no extra limbs, no distorted anatomy.
